audio_clips.text: A pink square rests on a white surface. Two hands fold it diagonally into a triangle.
Two hands fold a pink square sheet of paper diagonally, creating an X-shaped crease, then fold it in half horizontally, and unfold it. They bring two corners together to form a smaller triangle.
Two hands fold a pink paper in half, pressing the edge. They fold the top down to the center crease.
Two hands fold a pink rectangular paper into a smaller rectangle, pressing and reinforcing the edges.
Two hands hold a pink rectangular paper, folding it inward along diagonal creases to form a triangular shape, refining it into a fish-like shape with sharp creases.
Two hands fold a pink paper into a triangle along its diagonal creases.

Two hands fold pink paper into a triangle by bringing corners together and pressing the crease. The left corner is lifted and folded to the top, forming a smaller triangle, then pressed down. This is mirrored on the right side, aligning both folds along the center. The shape resembles the base of an origami fish with triangular fins.
Two hands hold a pink triangle, adjusting its folds into a fish shape. A black pen draws a circle for an eye. The origami fish is placed flat on the surface.
